GOOMO TEA SHOP

Real Fruit. Real Flavor. Real Good.

ABOUT US

About Goomo Tea Shop

We are Goomo Tea Shop, a local bubble tea destination in Walnut, CA dedicated to serving fresh, handcrafted tea and drinks with natural ingredients that brighten every day. Our team loves experimenting with fresh flavors and unique combinations so that every cup is a delightful experience.

Visit Us

Stop by our Walnut, CA tea shop

Loading map...

GOOMO TEA SHOP

1217 N Grand Ave, Walnut, CA 91789

(909) 595-0094

What Our Customers Say

Real reviews from our community

Grace C.
6 mo ago
★★★★★

“My new favorite boba spot in town! Super friendly service, fast drinks, and they even welcome my reusable cups. [...] Their jumbo classic milk tea and Thai tea are my go-tos.”

Vee D.
1 yr ago
★★★★★

“Cute boba spot with snacks and fun decor. Loved the Strawberry Tornado, Boba Bucket with toppings, fried tofu, and sweet potato. [...] Free sticker when you check in.”

Carrie L.
1 yr ago
★★★★★

“Highly recommend the limited Pink Sea yogurt smoothie with real strawberries. My CPP friends and I visit often for drinks and their famous popcorn chicken snacks.”

Sherns W.
3 yrs ago
★★★★★

“This boba spot took over Coffee Break and became our go-to. The Googoo Matcha slushy with pudding and Oreos is 10/10. [...] Drinks are now perfectly drinkable and I recommend them to everyone.”

Nat T.
4 yrs ago
★★★★★

“Very nice, clean location and great place to hang out. Friendly staff, easy kiosk ordering. Messy Milk with brown sugar boba and Googoo Matcha were both delicious.”

Shiqi C.
1 yr ago
★★★★★

“Jumbo Fruit Tea is my favorite—bucket size, full of fresh fruit and tea flavor. Love their popcorn chicken with dipping sauce. [...] Perfect spot for Mt. SAC and Cal Poly Pomona students.”

GOOMO TEA SHOP

Real Fruit. Real Flavor. Real Good.
